title: ceratozamia reesii
intro: Ceratozamia reesii, also known as the Rees' cycad, is a species of cycad in the family Zamiaceae, characterized by its unique, palm-like appearance with large, waxy leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceratozamia reesii are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds, leaves, and roots are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
